description: Letter from Avraham b. Se’ada, who complains about his brother Tabian. Around 1000. The addressee in unknown. Seems like this letter is on the same matter as T-S Loan 18. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #230) VMR
description_he: מכתב מאברהם בן סעדה שמתלונן על אחיו טביאן, כ-1000, הנמען לא ידוע
